name: SELF
summary: A self-sovereign identity wallet: hold your credentials, prove only what's needed — like being over 18 — without revealing anything else, and sign in with no passwords. No accounts, no servers. Every proof is checked genuine on your own device and keeps working offline.

description.p: It's your data, your rules. SELF is an identity wallet that does everything a centralized identity provider does — passwordless login, KYC, age and accreditation checks — and needs none of their infrastructure.

An issuer signs each credential once, and anyone can check it is genuine forever — without ever contacting the issuer. When you share, you reveal one fact and the rest never leave your device. The same flow serves a person (with a face or fingerprint) and an AI agent (with a granted permission).

ul: A wallet of credentials only you control, each one tamper-proof
Prove you're over 18 without revealing your birthday or your name
Passwordless sign-in and QR checks — the proof is the login, no server
Works offline: pull the network plug and every check still passes
One identity for people and AI agents alike

releases.description: A self-contained, serverless identity wallet demonstrating κ-native verifiable credentials and selective disclosure as a familiar SELF-style product: instant local DID, a credential wallet, passwordless Connect, QR verify, issuer/verifier roles, an airplane-mode proof of zero network egress, and human≡agent symmetry. Built on the real holo-identity / holo-credential / holo-present primitives.
